name: cultural_heritage_municipal_bond_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Cultural Heritage, the situation tagged internally around cultural heritage municipal bond stonehaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Noah Reed
agents.identity: I am Noah Reed, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Cultural Heritage. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ansel Sato
agents.identity: I am Ansel Sato, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Cultural Heritage. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if truth advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for loyalty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Noah Reed must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Noah Reed do?
